name: ROTTMNT - Dating Sim

200 Followers! I never thought I'd even get to 100, let alone double that, so here! Take my biggest bot yet, a ROTTMNT Dating Sim.

There are multiple achievements you can unlock

༺♥༻❀༺♥༻

I put too much effort into this

is this cheesy? Yes. Is this goofy? Yes. Did I have way too much fun making this considering the only dating sim I know is DDLC? Yes.

But then it ended up not working so it was a waste of time :']
